## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` all pass locally.
- [ ] I added/updated tests for my change (or it's docs-only).
- [ ] I kept `packages/core` pure (no `next`/`http`/server-heavy `fs` leaked in).
- [ ] I updated docs (`apps/docs`, README, or `CLAUDE.md`) if behavior changed.
